_note: X / Twitter handles Alexandru Dan (@KryptonAi) follows. The hunt pipeline boosts a news item's Social score when these voices discuss it — tier_1 counts 3×, tier_2 counts 2×, tier_3 counts 1×. Presence strongly positive; absence not negative.

tier_1_must_watch.name: Andrej Karpathy
tier_1_must_watch.why: Ex-OpenAI founding team, ex-Tesla Director of AI. Highest-signal individual voice in AI.

tier_1_must_watch.name: Yann LeCun
tier_1_must_watch.why: Turing Award, ex-Meta Chief AI Scientist. Strong opinions move the open-source debate.

tier_1_must_watch.name: Geoffrey Hinton
tier_1_must_watch.why: Turing Award. When he speaks about risk, it makes headlines.

tier_1_must_watch.name: Ilya Sutskever
tier_1_must_watch.why: SSI co-founder, ex-OpenAI Chief Scientist. Rare but load-bearing tweets.

tier_1_must_watch.name: Andrew Ng
tier_1_must_watch.why: Coursera/DeepLearning.ai founder. Sets ML-education and enterprise-AI narrative.

tier_1_must_watch.name: Sundar Pichai
tier_1_must_watch.why: Google/Alphabet CEO. Every tweet is a Google AI strategy signal.

tier_1_must_watch.name: Jason Wei
tier_1_must_watch.why: Meta Superintelligence Labs researcher (ex-OpenAI). Chain-of-thought, emergent abilities.

tier_2_trusted_practitioners.name: David Ha
tier_2_trusted_practitioners.why: Sakana AI CEO; thoughtful research-grounded takes.

tier_2_trusted_practitioners.name: Boris Cherny
tier_2_trusted_practitioners.why: Anthropic / Claude Code. First-party signal on Claude tooling.

tier_2_trusted_practitioners.name: Sebastian Raschka
tier_2_trusted_practitioners.why: Author of 'Build an LLM From Scratch'. Technical depth on model internals.

tier_2_trusted_practitioners.name: Hugging Face
tier_2_trusted_practitioners.why: Official HF account — open-source model releases and community.

tier_2_trusted_practitioners.name: Sakana AI
tier_2_trusted_practitioners.why: Research-heavy Tokyo lab; evolutionary model-merging work.

tier_2_trusted_practitioners.name: Aran Komatsuzaki
tier_2_trusted_practitioners.why: Early GPT-J / scaling work. Reliable AI research aggregator.

tier_2_trusted_practitioners.name: Alex Cornell
tier_2_trusted_practitioners.why: Design Director at Meta Superintelligence Labs.

tier_3_interesting.name: Charly Wargnier
tier_3_interesting.why: Tinkerer voice — LLMs, agents, Claude/Streamlit tooling.
